summary: Tested MoltBot Document Intelligence feature - AI-powered document classification using Gemini AI. All backend APIs and frontend UI features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - 'No events API' console warning (non-blocking, pre-existing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: MoltBot Document Intelligence fully functional. Uses Gemini AI (gemini-2.5-flash) via emergentintegrations library. All 3 API endpoints working, frontend MoltBot AI panel and details panel analyze button working.

API /api/document-ai/categories.Returns: 16 document categories (facture, devis, contrat, bon_commande, releve, attestation, identite, courrier, rapport, presentation, photo, marketing, technique, rh, juridique, autre)

API /api/document-ai/suggestions.Returns: List of documents needing analysis or with existing suggestions
API /api/document-ai/suggestions.Sample Response: 9 suggestions with document_id, original_name, needs_analysis fields

Frontend MoltBot AI Button.Opens: MoltBot AI panel showing 'Classification intelligente' and documents to analyze

Frontend Analyser avec MoltBot Button.Location: Details panel (right side) when document selected

Frontend AI Analysis Results.Shows: Type, Nom suggéré, Dossier, Résumé, Confiance (progress bar)

ui_verification.Documents Page Load: PASS - Google Drive-like interface loads correctly
ui_verification.MoltBot AI Button: PASS - Bot icon in header, opens AI panel on click
ui_verification.MoltBot AI Panel: PASS - Shows 'Classification intelligente', document count, Analyser buttons
ui_verification.Document Selection: PASS - Clicking document opens details panel
ui_verification.Details Panel: PASS - Shows document info and 'Analyser avec MoltBot' button
ui_verification.AI Analysis: PASS - Returns results with Type, Nom suggéré, Dossier, Résumé, Confiance

ai_integration.Status: WORKING - Real AI calls, not mocked
